---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you're trying to solve. What can't you do today that you want to be able to do?

Example: "As a server operator, I can't see which players are in an active match, which makes it hard to investigate lag reports."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. Include any API endpoints, UI changes, or new pages you're thinking of.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered and why you rejected them.

## Additional Context

Mockups, links to related issues, or any other context. If this is related to the upstream Pirate Radio server, link to the relevant code or database tables.
